title: Amsinckia mandonii
taxonomy: Amsinckia mandonii belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. This classification places it within the order Boraginales, which is a group of flowering plants. The genus Amsinckia is a small group of annual or biennial plants, native to the Americas and western Asia. Amsinckia mandonii is specifically found in the southwestern region of the United States. Its classification further refines to the species level, identifying it as a unique and distinct plant within its genus.
